Added tag newHeuristics for changeset c97fd2cd2c5e

Added postProccessRemainderGraph, which performs scarcity-preserving, no-cost edge eliminations subsequent to the running of the heuristic. It currently does not consider eliminations that reduce the nontrivial edge count, with the idea that these reflect a deficiency in the heuristic which must be corrected later. The postprocessing step is intended as a stupid/trivial bit that shouldnt find an improvement to the heuristic.newHeuristics
